name: No Bake Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, mix the cocoa, milk, sugar, and butter until well combined.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Boil for 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
4. Add the oats, peanut butter, and vanilla extract to the boiling mixture.
5. Quickly drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
6. Allow the cookies to harden for a few minutes before serving.
Makes approximately 25 to 32 cookies.
Alternate preparation: For cookie bars with a fudge-like texture, line an appropriate-sized cake pan with wax paper and spread the mixture evenly into the pan. Once set, cut into squares.
